To Try
by Alfred John
The only thing required is that you try.
An app for anyone trying to be better at anything. Built by someone who needed it himself — and shared freely, in that spirit.
One app for your whole life.
Most apps fix one thing. ToTry holds all of it — and a coach that sees how it connects.
⚔️
Beat what holds you back
Vices, urges, streaks — fought with grace, not shame.
💪
Train & eat with intention
Workouts, macros, water — synced with the apps you already use.
🕊️
Feed your soul
Scripture, morning intention, evening reflection.
💬
A coach who knows all of it
One AI that remembers your whole story and speaks to it.
What's your name?
This app speaks to you personally, not generically.
Already track in another app?
If you use one of these, we'll link to it instead of asking you to switch. Optional — skip if you'd rather start fresh.
Training
Hevy
Strong
Strava
Apple Fitness
Which Hevy do you have? This decides how we sync your workouts.
No problem — Hevy free doesn't allow live sync, but you can import your full history anytime. After setup: Track → connect Hevy → Import CSV (export from Hevy → Settings → Export Data). Your whole training history comes straight in.
Perfect — Pro gives you live sync. Paste your API key from hevy.com/settings?developer and your workouts will flow in automatically.
You can also do this later in Track. No rush.
Nutrition
MyFitnessPal
Cronometer
Bring your food history in right now — export a CSV from your app (MyFitnessPal: myfitnesspal.com → Settings → Export Data), then:
Don't have the file yet? Skip — the import lives in Nourish whenever you're ready.
Health
Apple Health
Google Health
You're in.
You can start right now and shape the deeper stuff as you go — or take two minutes to set your foundation first. There's no wrong answer.
Either way, the app walks you through the rest over your first few days.
I am becoming a person who...
Complete this sentence. This is your identity. It guides every choice from now on. You can change it anytime.
Don't know yet? Tap to use:
Why does this matter?
When it gets hard — and it will — this is what you'll come back to. Who are you doing this for?
Or tap one to start:
What season are you in?
Life isn't linear. The app speaks to you differently depending on where you actually are.
⚔️ Fighting
In the trenches. Daily battle with vices, urges, old patterns.
🔧 Rebuilding
Coming back after a hard period. Picking up pieces and getting steady.
🧱 Building
Stable now. Stacking habits, growing, going from okay to great.
🎉 Celebrating
Things are clicking. Wins are real. Keeping momentum.
💔 Grieving
Loss, heartbreak, or pain you're carrying. Survival mode is okay.
🌸 Resting
Recovering. Not pushing. This is also part of becoming.
What are you fighting?
Select everything that applies. No judgement. The app helps you become who you said you're becoming — free from these.
Lust / PMO
Weed
Vaping
Gambling
Alcohol
Food binging
Anger
Overthinking
Social media
Laziness
Overspending
Loneliness
Do you have a partner?
Your evening ritual can include prompts for your nightly call.
"I'm not here because I made it.
I'm here because I'm trying.
That's all any of us can do."
— Alfred John, Day 1
You're ready.
Your space is set up. Every day you open this is a day you chose to try.
To Try
by Alfred John
1
days in

Grow

Your body, honestly. Train, then fuel what you earned, then watch the result — one loop, not three trackers. Discipline of the body is discipline of the man.

Fight
Beat the vices holding you back. Clean streaks, urge support the moment you need it.
Health — train, nourish, then track the result
Train
Workouts, routines, strength over time. Synced with Hevy.
Nourish
Food, macros, water. Barcode + web lookup, your custom foods.
Track
Body, weight, photos, measurements, sleep — the result of training and fuelling.

Soul

The root beneath everything else. The body, the money, the fight — they all grow from here, or they don't last. This is where the app points past itself: to Christ, to the sacraments, to the people who love you. Stay grounded here, and the rest holds.

Morning
Start the day: gratitude, intention, a word, and prayer.
Reflect
Close the day: how it went, journal, examen, wins.
Today
How your day is going — your schedule, your streaks, and where your soul is at, woven together.
Bible
120 verses for whatever you're facing, a full reader, and verses saved for the road.
Today in the Church
The Mass readings for today and the saint the Church remembers. The living calendar of the faith.
Your Why
The reason you started, letters to your future self, and the promises you're keeping. All in one place.

Today in the Church

The readings and the saint for today.

Loading today's readings…

Your Why

When the motivation fades — and it will — this is what you come back to.

The reason I started
Who I'm becoming

Complete the sentence. The app holds you to this.

I am becoming a person who...
The season I'm in

Life isn't linear. The app speaks to you differently based on your season. Change anytime.

Affirmations

Short affirmations in the present tense. Read them when you need to remember.

Promises I'm keeping

Promises kept build identity. Log them, honour them, or be honest when you don't.

The people I'm doing this for

Your why isn't only about you. Add the people you carry with you. The app gently nudges you to reach out when too long passes.

Letters to your future self

Write something now. Deliver it later. A message you needed to hear from someone who actually knew what you were going through — you.

🧺 Plan meals & groceries
Get a few days of meals and a shopping list built around your calorie and protein targets — and your budget or preferences.

🍽️
Your fuel plan
Real meals and a priced shopping list, built around your training times, your goal, and your budget — timed so you're fuelled for every session. A PT in your pocket.
Already use MyFitnessPal or another tracker?

Bring your whole food history with you — no re-logging. Export a CSV from your current app, then import it here once.

How to export from MyFitnessPal
On a computer, sign in at myfitnesspal.com → your username → Settings → Export Data / Reports → request a CSV of your diary. They email you a file. Import it below.

Build a routine

Build a routine, save it, and it'll appear in Log to start anytime. Your weekly split is in the Log tab.

Saved routines

Build a session in the Log tab, save it here, then assign it to a day.

📚 Start from a proven program
Save your current Log session as a routine:
Or start from a proven template:
Need a recommendation?

Not sure what split to do? Answer a few questions and the AI will recommend one.

Personal records
💪 Weekly muscle volume

Last 7 days. Spot which muscles you're hitting hard and which you're skipping.

📈 Strength over time

Pick a lift to see your estimated 1RM climb. This is the proof you're getting stronger.

Mobility & warm-ups

Mobility is part of training, not an afterthought. Warm up the muscles you're about to work, and keep your joints moving well over time.

📷 Form check
Snap a photo at a key position (e.g. bottom of a squat, top of a deadlift) and I'll point out things to look at. This is general guidance from a single still — not a substitute for a coach or medical advice, and it can't see your full movement.
Ask your PT
Ask me anything about training or nutrition.
The Word
Living water for whatever you're facing. Bring what's heavy — there's a verse for it. This is the ground the whole thing stands on.

Type what you're feeling right now. The AI will find the verse that meets you exactly where you are.

Seeking the word for you...

Read scripture freely. Tap any verse to save it.

Loading scripture...

Verses saved from across the app. Tap any verse while reading to save it.

Write down what you're praying for. Mark answered prayers as they come — it builds your faith to look back.

Pray
Tell me what's on your heart — a worry, a person, a temptation, a thanksgiving — and I'll write a prayer you can pray now or save.
🕯️ Prayers of the saints
Pray with the words of the saints. Tap one to read it — and save it to recite again.
Your prayer story

The sacraments are grace you can return to. Keeping track isn't about scorekeeping — it's about staying close, and noticing when it's been a while.

He's read your whole story — your training, your fight, your money, your faith, what weighs on you. Not a search bar. Someone who knows you, and points you toward who you're becoming. Ask him anything.

Stewardship
Money is freedom, not just numbers. Every dollar reclaimed from a vice, every debt paid down, is a chain off your shoulders. Steward it well.
Debt left

Paid off
$0
—
Projected debt-free date
Log payments to calculate
$0
Saved by quitting vices
Set weekly vice spend below
Payoff strategy
❄️ Snowball — smallest debt first
Builds momentum. Every paid-off debt is a win that keeps you going.
🏔️ Avalanche — highest interest first
Saves the most money mathematically.
Debts — tap to log a payment
Add / update
Your savings goals

Add as many goals as you want. They appear at the top in priority order.

Vice savings calculator
⚡ Quick spend

One tap to log a recent expense. Just the amount and the category.

💰 This month
🔁 Subscriptions

Track recurring expenses. Cancel what doesn't serve you.

📅 Upcoming bills

One-off or annual bills with a due date. We'll surface the closest first.

🎯 Category budgets

Set a monthly limit per category. See how close you are.

💎 Net worth

Assets minus debts. Track over time.

👪 Family contribution

Money you give to family. Track what you contribute over time.

🃏 Poker sessions

Log each session’s buy-in and cash-out. See if you’re up or down over time. Optional — only if you play.

Evening prayer
Lord, thank You for this day. For the moments I got it right, and for Your grace when I didn't. I give You what I carried today — the wins, the failures, the urges I fought. Forgive me where I fell short. Strengthen me for tomorrow. Not perfect. Just better. Amen.
Tonight's call
Before you call
A prayer to share
The last step — your examen
Ignatian Examen · 5 steps
Walk through your day with God.

A 600-year-old practice. Five questions. This closes your day — do it last.

✓ Examen complete for today.
Day complete. Rest well.
Tomorrow is a new chance. You showed up today.

Promises & letters moved

Weekly review
This week
I am proud of
Next week I will focus on
Examination of conscience
Did I give in to any vice I wish I hadn't?
Was I honest with myself and others?
Did I treat the people around me with patience and respect?
Did I honour God in how I spent my time?
Did I do what I said I would do?
What did I avoid that I knew I needed to face?
Closing prayer
Lord, a week has passed. You saw all of it — what I did well and what I failed at. Thank You for not giving up on me when I gave up on myself. As I begin a new week, give me the strength to be better than the last. Amen.

Your week

Work, classes, gym, commitments — in one place. Paste a roster or type what's on.

✨ Add with AI

Paste a work roster email, your class timetable, or just type plainly — "gym Mon Wed Fri 6am, work Tue 9-5, class Thursday 2pm". The AI turns it into events.

⏳ Your time
Settings
The quiet controls. And the most important one of all is here too: the person you're becoming.
💞 If you need real help right now
🇦🇺 Lifeline: 13 11 14
🇦🇺 Beyond Blue: 1300 22 4636
🇦🇺 Crisis Text: Text HOME to 0477 01 3755
🌐 Find support in your country
To Try is a self-improvement tool, not a substitute for professional support.

\uD83D\uDC64 About you Helps tailor your nutrition & training

This shapes the real numbers \u2014 calorie and protein targets, training context \u2014 and helps the app understand you. Used for the math, never to box you in.

\u271D Faith How much scripture surfaces for you

To Try was built honestly from a Christian heart \u2014 that won't change. But you're welcome here whatever you believe. Choose how much of the faith surfaces day to day. The companion, the systems, and every practical feature work fully either way.

📈 History & insights Heatmap, past Sundays, search, year review
📈 Show-up heatmap

The days you actually showed up — past 13 weeks. Tap a day to see what you did.

📖 Past Sundays

Every weekly synthesis the Coach has written for you. Read what you were navigating, week by week.

🔍 Search your history

Find anything you've written — journal entries, wins, saved verses, examens, prayers. One bar searches all of it.

📅 Year in review

See your full year of trying — anytime. Auto-prompts in late December.

🔗 Connected apps Strava, Hevy, Apple Health

Apps you use alongside To Try. We open them with one tap and import data where possible.

⚙️ Usage stats (dev)

AI calls + token totals so you can see how heavy the app is getting. Local only — never sent anywhere.

🎬 Demo data (for tutorials)

Loads a realistic, camera-ready dataset into this account so every screen looks alive for recording. Use on your dedicated test account — it overwrites this account's data.

🛡️ Community submissions

Items users chose to share. Nothing goes into the public library until you approve it. Approve adds it for everyone; reject deletes the submission.

☕ Support the project

ToTry costs about $20-50 AUD/month to keep running (AI calls + hosting). If it has helped you, you can chip in.

Optional. Never unlocks features. Just keeps the app free for everyone.

Full backup

Your data syncs to the cloud, but you can also keep your own copy. Download everything as a single file — every log, reflection, and setting — and restore it on any device, even with no account.

Account
Signed in as
Loading...
Cloud sync
Checking…

Your data is saved to your account in the cloud — that's the real copy. This device keeps a fast local copy. Sign out anytime; everything restores when you sign back in.

Danger zone
Reset all local data
Wipe device storage. Cloud data stays.
Delete account permanently
All data, cloud + local. No recovery.
💡 Help improve ToTry

Found a bug? Got an idea? Something feel off? Tell me directly — this app gets better because real people say what's wrong. Every message is read.

ℹ About ToTry Privacy, terms, contact
About

Anonymous, aggregate usage stats (opens, installs, feature milestones) help improve the app. Never collected: your vices, prayers, journals, food, or weight — that data is yours alone. No cross-site tracking and no ads. Your personal data isn't sold, and that won't change.

Built by Alfred John. For anyone trying to be better at anything.

@totry_aj on Instagram

Privacy & legal

Your personal data is stored on your own device. When you use AI features (Coach, Bible, screenshot reading), your request is sent to AI providers (such as Anthropic, Google, or OpenAI) to generate a response — their handling is governed by their own policies. ToTry itself does not sell your data or run its own ads. Please read the full privacy policy for details.

Install To Try on your iPhone
1. Tap the Share button ↗︎ at the bottom of Safari
2. Tap "Add to Home Screen"
3. Tap "Add" in the top right
Your data saves permanently. Works offline.
